content:
Dear @everyone,
Thank you so much from the bottom of our hearts for your help!
We have compiled the translation contributions we've received so far; the translations have been updated in game as of today (January 22).
The list of Volunteers in our in-game Special Thanks page will also be updated according to this list.
Please confirm if we have logged your name (The name you want us to credit you by) and contribution content correctly!
If there is any mistake, please let me know and we will fix it asap.


KR:
●BlackCatNero ー　
Translated WoD and Relic effects
Proofread multiple human-translated content(Faded Legacy Chapter 1~3, side stories, UI, effects, etc.)

●LavenderJuly ー
Translated & Proofread Traphase lines
Translated FeatureUnlock
Translated Aurita's Psyche Deepdive, Culinary Dominion

JP:
● Alza — Translation & Proofreading (various lines in Astral Reign Ch.1, Special Ops_Salvador, Special Ops_24, Dreamscape_Miryam, Special Ops_Horla, Dreamscape_Castor, Dreamscape_Pollux, Psyche Deepdive_Corposant, Skills, Items, Relics, Events, Stages, Resonance, Awakener, Activity, Gacha, Voice lines, Gameplay UI, etc.)

<@1376763322568937562> 
Could you please change :

JP:
● Alza — Translation & Proofreading (various lines in Astral Reign Ch.1, Special Ops_Salvador, Special Ops_24, Dreamscape_Miryam, Special Ops_Horla, Dreamscape_Castor, Dreamscape_Pollux, Psyche Deepdive_Corposant, Skills, Items, Relics, Events, Stages, Resonance, Awakener, Activity, Gacha, Voice lines, Gameplay UI, etc.)
I think the contribution content is wrong, and ayla did not contribute in the localization.
2025 December & 2026 January Contribution Log: V2.4.X Updates
